name: design-system
description: Design system gap closure — 3 workers handling non-overlapping CSS regions

members.name: worker-c
members.prompt:
You are Worker C on the design-system team. Read task #3 using TaskGet to get your full instructions, then claim it with TaskUpdate (set status to in_progress and owner to worker-c).

**IMPORTANT CONTEXT**: You are working in a git worktree — an isolated copy of the repo. Create a new branch `feat/form-primitives-rubyui` and work there.

**Key files you'll need to read first**:
- `app/assets/tailwind/application.css` (lines 798-1648 — the form component CSS)
- ALL primitives in `app/components/meridian/primitives/` (11 files)
- ALL composites in `app/components/meridian/composites/` (contact_collector.rb, select_travel_dates.rb, travel_history_form.rb)
- RubyUI components: `app/components/ruby_ui/input/input.rb`, `app/components/ruby_ui/button/button.rb`, `app/components/ruby_ui/form/form_field.rb`, `app/components/ruby_ui/form/form_field_label.rb`, `app/components/ruby_ui/form/form_field_error.rb`, `app/components/ruby_ui/checkbox/checkbox.rb`
- `app/components/base.rb` (includes RubyUI mixin)
- `app/components/ruby_ui/base.rb` (TailwindMerge pattern)
- Existing tests: `test/components/meridian/primitives/` (all test files)

**CRITICAL design decision about RubyUI::Input vs native HTML**: 
The RubyUI::Input component uses `rounded-3xl` (fully rounded pill shape) which is NOT the visual design of the existing Meridian inputs (which use `rounded-lg` / 0.5rem). You need to override this with `class: "rounded-lg text-[16px]"` when rendering RubyUI::Input. The TailwindMerge in RubyUI::Base will handle the conflict.

Also note: RubyUI::Input adds Stimulus `data-action` attributes for `ruby-ui--form-field` controller. These will coexist with Meridian's own Stimulus controllers (`text-input`, `component-form`, etc.) since they target different controllers. This is fine.

**Shared Tailwind tokens** (replaces the shared CSS at lines 798-978):
- Wrapper: `w-full max-w-[450px] my-3 font-sans max-sm:max-w-full`
- Form box: `bg-muted border border-border/50 rounded-2xl rounded-tl-sm p-3 sm:p-4`
- Label: `block text-sm text-foreground mb-2 max-sm:text-[0.8125rem]`
- Helper text: `block text-xs text-muted-foreground mt-1`

**Implementation approach for each primitive**:
1. Read the current component file
2. Read its corresponding CSS classes in application.css
3. Replace each custom CSS class with equivalent Tailwind utilities
4. Where appropriate, use RubyUI components (Input, FormField, FormFieldLabel, Button) for the inner HTML elements
5. Preserve ALL Stimulus data attributes, form action/method, CSRF tokens, Turbo Stream attributes
6. The component must be a drop-in replacement — same props, same behavior, different visual implementation

**Skip these (no changes needed)**:
- `input_date.rb` — already uses Tailwind
- `select_visa_type.rb` — delegates to InputSelect, no custom CSS
- `select_country.rb` — delegates to InputSelect, no custom CSS

**For InputSelect**: Do NOT use RubyUI::Select (it's a JS dropdown). Keep the native `<select>` element but replace CSS classes with Tailwind utilities. The native select is better for mobile UX.

**CSS removal**: After ALL components are updated, remove lines 798-1648 from `app/assets/tailwind/application.css`. Be precise — only remove those lines, keep everything above line 797.

**ERB deletion**: Delete all 11 ERB files in `app/views/components/primitives/` and all 5 ERB files in `app/views/components/composites/`. These are thin wrappers around the Phlex components.

**Tests**: Update tests in `test/components/meridian/primitives/` to add render assertions. Use the established pattern:
```ruby
test "renders with Tailwind utility classes" do
  component = Components::Meridian::Primitives::InputText.new(field: "test", label: "Test")
  html = ApplicationController.render(component, layout: false)
  assert_includes html, "max-w-[450px]"
  assert_no_match(/text-input-wrapper/, html)
end
```

**Commit format**: `<type>: <subject>` (max 50 chars, no period, no scope, NO Co-Authored-By)
Add `Closes meridian-60en` in the commit body.

**After all components are updated + CSS removed + ERBs deleted + tests pass**:
1. Run `bin/rails test && bin/rubocop -a && bin/brakeman` and fix any failures
2. Commit all changes
3. Push branch and create PR with `gh pr create` targeting `main`
4. Report back with `PR: <url>`
